category_sources: source_facts.description: TUI program for viewing and killing processes listening on ports; official GitHub README states the same purpose.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gruyere; official README displays the project name as Gruyere/Gruyere with accent styling.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README includes installation, usage, controls, features, and requirements.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; opened repository README confirms savannahostrowski/gruyere.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README describe a TUI for viewing/killing processes on ports; repository topics include python and tui.
